title: Feed Manager + Alert Enrichment + TI Automation — Enrichment Pipeline
description: test_feed_manager.py, test_alert_enrichment_engine.py, and test_threat_intelligence_automation_engine.py cluster with test_security_awareness_metrics_engine.py. Alert enrichment computes severity_multiplier risk scores with SHA-256 API key hashing. Gap: enrichment is triggered manually — alerts are not automatically enriched when ingested, and the feed manager does not route IOC hits back to enrich open alerts.
missing: Auto-enrichment on alert ingestion: hook alert_enrichment_engine into the SIEM ingestion pipeline so every new alert is enriched within 5 seconds
IOC hit → alert enrichment: when threat_intelligence_automation finds an IOC match, auto-enrich all open alerts containing that indicator
Enrichment confidence scoring: aggregate enrichment source confidence scores to compute a final alert confidence level (0-1) for analyst prioritization
